message:
🐛 fix(analytics): ACCM chart shows only current week + misclassifies Copilot as human (#6147)

The ACCM dashboard on /analytics had two bugs visible at a glance:

1. **Weekly PR/Issue chart only showed the current week.** When the repo
   produces more than 300 PRs in a single week (current activity), the
   3-page × 100-item fetch window never escapes the most recent week,
   so every older week renders as zero bars. Bump MAX_PAGES 3 → 15
   (1500 items) so the 12-week history actually backfills with data.

2. **Copilot and other bots counted as human contributions.** The AI
   classifier only matched `clubanderson`, so the 9 Copilot PRs in the
   last week were tallied under "Human Contributions" (43% human when
   nearly all activity is AI-driven). Extend the classifier to:
     - include `Copilot` and `copilot-swe-agent[bot]` explicitly
     - treat any `*[bot]` login as AI (future-proofs against other
       GitHub App bots writing code)

Sanity-checked the logic: clubanderson, Copilot, copilot-swe-agent[bot],
dependabot[bot] → AI; KumarADITHYA123 (drive-by contributor) → human;
label-tagged PRs → AI regardless of author.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
